title: MedNLI: Clinical Natural Language Inference
description: Natural language inference for clinical text. Annotators determine whether a clinical hypothesis is entailed by, contradicted by, or neutral with respect to a premise sentence from clinical notes. Based on the MedNLI dataset derived from MIMIC-III clinical notes.

author.name: Romanov & Shivade
author.affiliation: University of Massachusetts Amherst / IBM Research
